I build web products that drive business results.

Fullstack developer based in Buenos Aires. I help startups and businesses ship fast, scalable, and maintainable web products.

What I Do

From MVPs to full-scale applications — I cover the entire stack.

⚡

Fullstack Web Development

MVPs, web apps, and marketing sites built with React, Next.js, Astro, and Node.js. From idea to production.

 🔍

Technical Consulting

Architecture reviews, performance audits, and tech stack selection. Get expert guidance before you build.

 🎨

Frontend / UI Engineering

Design systems, component libraries, and responsive UIs that look great and perform even better.
